message: Array index "i" used as key — causes bugs when list is reordered or filtered
help: Use a stable unique identifier: `key={item.id}` or `key={item.slug}` — index keys break on reorder/filter

message: 4 setState calls in a single useEffect — consider using useReducer or deriving state
help: Combine into useReducer: `const [state, dispatch] = useReducer(reducer, initialState)`

help:

{item.name}
`

message: Non-descriptive handler name "handleClick" — name should describe what it does, not when it runs
help: Rename to describe the action: e.g. `handleSubmit` → `saveUserProfile`, `handleClick` → `toggleSidebar`

message: useState "prevFavorites" is updated but never read in the component's return — use useRef so updates don't trigger re-renders

message: <input value={...}> with no `onChange` or `readOnly` — React renders this as a silently read-only field
help: Pass an explicit initial value to `useState` (e.g. `useState("")` instead of `useState()`), add `onChange` (or `readOnly` to opt out) when you supply `value`, and drop `defaultValue` on controlled inputs — React ignores it
